purpose: Compatibility map from legacy J01-J10 screencasts to portfolio candidates.
rules: Legacy J01-J10 remain runnable until P0 passes end-to-end.
Portfolio candidates clone, split or extend legacy journeys instead of renaming them in place.
J10 is policy-frame-only unless dedicated j10.* handlers are implemented.

caveats.J10: Policy/security/template changes remain policy-frame-only until dedicated j10.* handlers exist.
caveats.P0-03: Onboarding and MFA are demo-state, not real authentication.
caveats.P0-11: Export is metadata/package-manifest proof, not real binary archive generation.
caveats.P1-02: Communication routes are route/static unless dedicated communication handlers are added.
